producer.displayName: Codex CLI local task with tenant-isolation claim gaps
producer.trustBoundary: The producer reports a tenant-isolation policy change and partial evidence. Reviewers must inspect normalized evidence, claim-level gaps, waiver metadata, and policy summaries before accepting the change.

source.workspacePolicy: Use one dedicated worktree for the sample Issue and do not stage .codex-local/tasks/.

rawSignals.value: Codex updated a fixture-only tenant-isolation authorization policy, added one focused unit test, and documented the intended reviewer flow.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: This is producer text. It is evidence input, not approval or a high-assurance result.

rawSignals.value: Tenant isolation is selected as a high-risk claim; missing adversarial and runtime-control evidence must remain visible when strict assurance is selected.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: Risk escalation is selected by policy labels and assurance profile, not by producer confidence.

rawSignals.value: Focused tenant-isolation unit test passed in the producer session.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: A focused test is behavior evidence only. It is not proof and does not replace adversarial or runtime-control evidence.

rawSignals.value: The producer did not provide property/adversarial evidence for cross-tenant negative cases.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: The control plane keeps this as missing evidence for reviewer disposition.

rawSignals.value: The waiver record mentions an emergency exception but omits owner, reason, and expiry.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: Incomplete waiver metadata is a report-only finding in the fast lane and a blocking strict-assurance issue when enforcement is selected.

changedFiles.role: fixture-only high-risk tenant isolation policy change
focused behavior evidence supplied by the producer

commands.evidenceUse: Focused behavior evidence for the selected tenant-isolation claim.
Schema validation evidence for generated artifacts.
Adversarial/property evidence required before the selected critical claim can be treated as satisfied.
Runtime-control evidence required for high-assurance tenant-isolation enforcement.

claimsMentioned.rawAssertion: The account-read path checks tenant id before repository access.
claimsMentioned.controlPlaneBoundary: The focused test supports behavior only; adversarial and runtime-control evidence remain required for the selected critical claim.

claimsMentioned.rawAssertion: An emergency waiver exists for a rollout window, but the producer did not list owner, reason, or expiry.
claimsMentioned.controlPlaneBoundary: A waiver without complete owner/reason/expiry/affected-claim/evidence-link metadata must remain a reviewer action item.

claimsMentioned.rawAssertion: Codex completed the task, but that is not a control-plane approval or proof result.
claimsMentioned.controlPlaneBoundary: Policy decision remains report-only or blocking according to risk labels, assurance mode, and reviewer evidence.

expectedArtifacts.purpose: Normalize raw Codex CLI high-risk claim output into report-only routing context.
Show selected critical claims, missing evidence, unresolved status, and waiver metadata gaps.
Render selected high-risk claim gaps as reviewer-facing assurance evidence without calling focused tests proof.
Show fast-lane report-only behavior and strict high-risk blocking behavior for the same claim gaps.

knownGaps.summary: Focused unit evidence does not satisfy adversarial/property and runtime-control requirements for a selected tenant-isolation claim.
Waiver metadata gaps stay visible as reviewer actions and are blocking when strict assurance is selected.

missingEvidence.summary: Command evidence is not complete: pnpm -s exec vitest run tests/property/auth/tenant-isolation-cross-tenant.test.ts --reporter dot (not-run-in-producer-output)

Claim has no supporting evidence list: tenant-isolation-waiver-has-reviewable-metadata

controlPlaneJudgment.reason: Report-only normalization summarizes raw producer output and routing gaps; it does not decide pass, proved, or approved status.
